scripts.eas:build:preview:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.eas:build:preview:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.eas:build:production:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:build:production:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:build:production:all: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform all --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:production:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:production:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile production
